Jwt._comment: Development uses the local RS256 key provider (KeyVaultUri is empty). Set DevKeyPath to a PEM file to use a stable key across restarts; otherwise an ephemeral RSA-2048 key is generated at startup. Generate one with: openssl genrsa -out jwt-dev-signing.pem 2048 (the *.pem path is git-ignored).

Authentication._comment: UseStub keeps the deterministic StubSsoService in development, where no real Google/Microsoft OAuth credentials exist. Set to false once real client id/secret are placed in the Authentication:Google / Authentication:Microsoft sections to use the real SsoService.
